title: Family Context Standard (FCS) - Core Schema
description: Zero-Data Retention basic schema for routing patient and caregiver context. Copyright (c) 2026 Oleksiy Marchenko. Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.

patient_id.description: Unique identifier of the primary patient (e.g., UUID).

relative_id.description: Unique identifier of the caregiver or partner involved in the Partner Loop.

anxiety_level_lastmeter.description: Distress or anxiety level measured via the Lastmeter scale (0-10). Used to trigger the Caregiver Loop.
